{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"x @@ y"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"x ~ 'y'"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"x ~* 'y'"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"|/ x"}
{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Invalid expression / Unexpected token","sql":"||/ x"}

{"dialect":"postgres","category":"parse: Required keyword","sql":"SELECT * FROM foo WHERE id = %s"}
